styles.label: English (Master)
styles.example_quote:
Take a deep breath.
The infinite scroll won't bring you peace.
styles.breathing_appreciation: Proud of you for stepping away.
breathing_quotes: Your mind is like water. When it is agitated, it becomes difficult to see. But if you allow it to settle, the answer becomes clear.
The soul always knows what to do to heal itself. The challenge is to silence the mind.
Feel the breath flow in. Feel the clutter flow out.
Peace is not the absence of noise, but the presence of focus.
quotes:
Drop your shoulders.
Unclench your jaw.
Take a deep breath.

The infinite scroll won't bring you peace.
Pause. Breathe.
Look up.

Your attention is your life.
Take it back.
Breathe.

Is this how you want
to spend your time?
Take a mindful breath.

You can always earn more money,
but you can’t earn more time.
Put the phone down.

How many 'just five more minutes'
have you used today?

Don't trade your long-term dreams
for a short-term scroll.

The algorithm knows what you like;
it doesn't know what you need.

Notice the weight of your body
in your chair.
Now, stand up.

Your eyes are tired.
Give them the gift of a
distant horizon.

Feel your feet on the floor.
You are here.
Not in the cloud.

Is this a choice,
or is it a habit?
Choose to leave.

The world is waiting for you
to contribute,
not just consume.

Everything you are looking for
is outside of this app.

Stop watching other people
live their lives.
Go live yours.

Log off.
Shut down.
Look up.

The most important notification
is your own
well-being.

Be the master of your tools,
not the slave to your screen.

Your life is happening right now.
It is not behind this screen.

You are a human being,
not a user.
Come back to yourself.

The world is in color.
This is just glass and pixels.
Look out a window.

How does your body feel?
Heavy? Tense?
Give it a stretch.

You aren't missing anything
that matters more
than your own peace.

The 'next post' is a lie.
It won't make you
feel more complete.

This app will be here later.
Your focus is here
only right now.

Quiet the noise.
Listen to the room.
What do you hear?

You are searching for
something that isn't
on this website.

Take a 60-second break.
No screen. No sound.
Just you.

Is this making you happy,
or is it just
keeping you busy?

You are trading your
life force
for a curated screen.

Is this how you
planned to spend
your precious day?

Minutes become hours.
Hours become days.
Don't let them vanish.

You’ve been here
longer than you think.
Check the clock.

The app is designed
to keep you here.
Reclaim your agency.

Your future self
will thank you
for stopping now.

One more scroll
won't satisfy you.
It will only drain you.

Time is the only
non-renewable resource.
Spend it wisely.

Are you gaining value,
or just losing time?
Be honest.

The world needs
your presence,
not your clicks.

styles.label: Hinglish (India)
styles.example_quote:
Life is outside this screen.
Bahar niklo.
styles.breathing_appreciation: Proud of you for taking a break.
breathing_quotes: Mind ko thoda shanti do. Depth mein jaao.
Ek deep breath lo. Screen ki duniya se bahar aao.
Sukoon tabhi milega jab tum rukna seekhoge.
Mind distract ho raha hai? Breathe karo.
quotes:
Bas ek aur scroll?
Time waste mat karo.
**Focus wapas lao.**

Algorithm ko jeetne mat do.
Apna waqt wapas lo.
**Phone rakho abhi.**

Kya yeh 5 minutes
waqayi 5 minutes thhe?
**Clock check karo.**

Screen time badh raha hai,
Real life ghat rahi hai.
**Stop scrolling.**

Kal regret karoge ki
aaj waqt barbad kiya.
**Choose wisely.**

Zindagi screen ke bahar hai,
Apps ke andar nahi.
**Log off karo.**

Internet pe sab wahi hai,
Par tumhara waqt ja raha hai.
**Move on.**

Duniya color mein hai,
Screen sirf pixels hai.
**Bahar dekho.**

Deep breath lo.
Body ko stretch karo.
**You are here, right now.**

Notification se zyada zaroori
tumhari peace hai.
**Stay calm.**

Social media ki life fake hai,
Tumhari mehnat real hai.
**Focus on you.**

Phone ki chinta chhodo,
Apne posture ka socho.
**Straight baitho.**

Kya yeh scroll karke
khushi mil rahi hai?
**Be honest.**

Tumhari aankhein thak gayi hain.
Unhe thoda rest do.
**Close your eyes.**

Dusron ki life dekhna band karo,
Apni life pe dhyan do.
**Go work.**

App band karne ka
perfect time yahi hai.
**Do it now.**

Scroll karke billionaire nahi banoge.
**Kaam pe wapas jao.**

Phone tumhein chala raha hai,
ya tum phone chala rahe ho?
**Control lo.**

Lazy mat bano.
Paani piyo aur
**Phone side mein rakho.**

Content consume karna aasaan hai,
Create karna mushkil.
**Be a creator.**

Is app ke paas tumhare liye
naya kuch nahi hai.
**Exit button dabao.**

Connections > Consumption.
Kisi ko call karo.
**Screen off karo.**

Aas-paas ki 3 cheezein dekho.
Real world mein wapas aao.
**Breathe.**

Phone rakhne ka sign
dhund rahe thhe?
**Toh yeh raha sign.**

Din khatam hone wala hai.
Kya tum satisfied ho?
**Make it count.**

Mind ko distract mat karo,
Mind ko rest do.
**Pause. Reflect.**

Digital noise bahut hai.
Silence mein baitho thodi der.
**Switch off.**

Tumhari productivity
screen ke peeche chhupi hai.
**Find it.**

Sapne scroll karne se
pure nahi hote.
**Action lo.**

Ek break lo.
Chai piyo, walk pe jao.
**Par phone mat chhuna.**

Self-improvement mehnat mangti hai,
Scrolling sirf ungli.
**Go build.**

Apni energy bacha ke rakho.
Screen pe mat bahao.
**Unplug now.**

Aaj ka task yaad hai?
Usko finish karne ka waqt hai.
**Keep going.**

Phone lock karo.
Andar ki awaaz suno.
**What do you need?**

You are more powerful
than an algorithm.
**Prove it today.**

styles.label: Hindi (India)
styles.example_quote:
समय अनमोल है।
इसे व्यर्थ न करें।
**फोन नीचे रखें।**
styles.breathing_appreciation: स्वयं को समय देने के लिए धन्यवाद।
breathing_quotes: मन की शांति ही सबसे बड़ी संपत्ति है।
एक गहरी सांस लें और वर्तमान में लौट आएं।
संसार का शोर थमेगा नहीं, आपको मौन होना होगा।
एकाग्रता ही सफलता का मार्ग है।
quotes:
समय अनमोल है।
इसे व्यर्थ न करें।
**फोन नीचे रखें।**

क्या यह आपकी पसंद है,
या मात्र एक आदत?
**जागरूक बनें।**

वर्तमान में जिएं।
यह स्क्रीन आपका जीवन नहीं है।
**ऊपर देखें।**

अपनी शांति को
डिजिटल शोर में न खोएं।
**गहरी सांस लें।**

सफलता निरंतरता मांगती है,
स्क्रॉलिंग केवल समय लेती है।
**काम पर लौटें।**

भीड़ का हिस्सा न बनें।
अपने विचारों को समय दें।
**एकाग्र रहें।**

क्या यह सामग्री आपको
बेहतर बना रही है?
**विचार कीजिए।**

आपकी आंखें थक गई हैं।
क्षितिज की ओर देखें।
**आराम दें।**

जीवन की वास्तविकता
बाहर प्रतीक्षा कर रही है।
**स्क्रीन बंद करें।**

दूसरों की प्रगति को
देखना बंद करें।
**स्वयं पर ध्यान दें।**

मन को शांत रखें।
इस शोर से बाहर निकलें।
**मौन का आनंद लें।**

एक गहरी सांस लें।
अपने अस्तित्व को महसूस करें।
**आप यहाँ हैं।**

समय की धारा बह रही है।
इसे व्यर्थ न बहने दें।
**अभी रुकें।**

डिजिटल दुनिया एक भ्रम है।
प्रकृति के करीब जाएं।
**बाहर टहलें।**

आपका ध्यान ही
आपकी सबसे बड़ी शक्ति है।
**इसे वापस लें।**

क्या आप अपने समय के
स्वामी हैं, या दास?
**निर्णय आपका है।**

अपने भीतर की आवाज़ सुनें,
नोटिफिकेशन की नहीं।
**फोन रख दें।**

आज के कार्यों की सूची
अभी अधूरी है।
**उठें और कार्य करें।**

अनुभव प्राप्त करें,
केवल जानकारी नहीं।
**जीना शुरू करें।**

यह पल फिर कभी
वापस नहीं आएगा।
**इसे सार्थक बनाएं।**

सोशल मीडिया के जाल से
स्वयं को मुक्त करें।
**स्वतंत्र जिएं।**

एकाग्रता ही
सफलता की कुंजी है।
**भटकाव छोड़ें।**

पानी पिएं, थोड़ा टहलें।
इस यंत्र से दूर हटें।
**विश्राम लें।**

विचारों को स्पष्ट करें।
डिजिटल कचरे को हटा दें।
**मस्तिष्क को साफ करें।**

ज्ञान कर्म से आता है,
केवल देखने से नहीं।
**कर्मठ बनें।**

अपने दिन का नियंत्रण
अपने हाथों में लें।
**अभी लॉग-ऑफ करें।**

शांति कहीं बाहर नहीं,
आपके भीतर है।
**अंतर्मुखी बनें।**

व्यर्थ की चर्चा से बेहतर
स्वयं का विकास है।
**आगे बढ़ें।**

एक छोटा सा विराम
नई ऊर्जा दे सकता है।
**रुकें और सोचें।**

स्क्रीन की रोशनी से
बाहर निकलें।
**धूप को महसूस करें।**

आपका भविष्य आपके
आज के निर्णयों पर है।
**फोन त्यागें।**

दिखावे की दुनिया से दूर
सत्य को खोजें।
**सादा जीवन जिएं।**

अपनी ऊर्जा बचाएं।
इसे सृजन में लगाएं।
**निर्माण करें।**

यह अंत नहीं, एक नई
शुरुआत का संकेत है।
**अब बंद करें।**

आपकी क्षमताएं
असीमित हैं।
**उन्हें पहचानें।**

styles.label: Bollywood (India)
styles.example_quote:
Mogambo khush nahi hoga
Agar tum saara din
**Scroll karte rahoge.**
styles.breathing_appreciation: Picture abhi baaki hai... par thoda break zaroori hai.
breathing_quotes: Babu moshai, zindagi badi honi chahiye, lambi nahi. Thoda saas lo.
Don ko pakadna mushkil hi nahi... par screen time kam karna aasaan hai.
Main apni favourite hoon, isliye main apna time waste nahi karti.
Jaa Simran jaa... jee le apni zindagi screen ke bina!
quotes:
Picture abhi baaki hai dost,
Par phone rakhne ka
**Interval aa gaya hai.**

Mogambo khush nahi hoga
Agar tum saara din
**Scroll karte rahoge.**

Pushpa, I hate scrolls!
Phone thoda side rakho,
**Isko drop karo.**

Babu Moshai,
Zindagi badi honi chahiye,
**Screen time nahi.**

Ek baar jo maine commitment kardi,
Phir main apne aap ki bhi nahi sunta.
**Ab phone lock karo!**

Don ko pakadna mushkil hi nahi,
Namumkin hai.
**Par tumhara phone aasaan hai.**

Rishte mein toh hum
tumhare 'Focus' lagte hain,
**Naam hai ScrollBreaker.**

Mere paas Maa hai,
Tumhare paas sirf
**Dopamine aur WiFi hai.**

Thappad se darr nahi lagta saheb,
Screen time report se
**Darr lagta hai.**

Rahul, naam toh suna hoga?
Ab kaam bhi kar lo,
**Phone side mein rakho.**

Yeh scroll mujhe de de Thakur!
Apne haath kaam pe lagao,
**Abhi ke abhi.**

Tension lene ka nahi,
Sirf phone side mein
**Dene ka.**

Kitne posts thhe?
Sarkar, gin nahi paye.
**Ab bas bhi karo!**

Filmein teen cheezon se chalti hain:
Entertainment, Entertainment...
**Aur tumhara Break!**

I'll make you an offer
you can't refuse:
**Lock the screen now.**

Haar kar jitne wale ko
Baazigar kehte hain,
**Phone rakhne wale ko Legend.**

Kattappa ne Baahubali ko
kyun maara?
**Taaki woh kaam pe dhyan de.**

Tumse na ho payega...
Agar aise hi scroll
**Karte rahoge toh.**

Parampara. Pratishtha. Anushasan.
Inka palan karo aur
**App band karo.**

Teja main hoon, mark idhar hai.
Focus idhar hai,
**Phone udhar rakho.**

Bade bade deshon mein
aisi chhoti chhoti scrolling
**Nahi honi chahiye.**

Abhi hum zinda hain!
Screen ke bahar bhi
**Ek duniya hai.**

All is well!
Par tabhi, jab tum
**Phone rakh doge.**

Crime Master Gogo naam hai mera,
Focus chura le jaunga,
**Aakhen kholo!**

Main apni favourite hoon!
Isliye main apna
**Time waste nahi karti.**

Zindagi jine ke do hi tarike hote hain.
Ek scroll karo, ya
**Badlav lekar aao.**

Mera vachan hi hai shasan.
Aur mera vachan hai:
**Ab phone rakho.**

Utha le re baba, utha le...
Mere ko nahi,
**Is phone ko side mein!**

Jaa Simran jaa,
Jee le apni zindagi
**Mobile ke bina.**

Apun hi Bhagwan hai...
Par meri bhi sun lo,
**Break le lo.**

Picture abhi baaki hai...
Par tumhara data pack
**Khatam hone wala hai.**

Hamare dhande mein dushman
zyada hote hain.
**Sabse bada dushman: Reels.**

Don ka intezar toh
11 mulkon ki police kar rahi hai.
**Par tumhara kaam kab tak?**

Kaun kambakht scroll karne ke liye
app kholta hai?
**Hum toh break ke liye hain.**

Kkh... Kkh... Kkh... Kiran!
Phone chhodo aur
**Reality se dosti karo.**

styles.label: Spiritual (India)
styles.example_quote:
Shiv ka dhyan dharon.
Digital shor ko tyago aur
**Shunya mein sukoon dhoondo.**
styles.breathing_appreciation: Antarmon ki awaaz sunne ke liye dhanyawad.
breathing_quotes: Ek gehri saans lo. Param Pita ka aashirwad mehsoos karo.
Mann ko sthir rakho. Chanchalta tyaago aur shaanti ka anubhav karo.
Maya ke bandhan ko kaato. Digital duniya se mukt ho jao.
Om ka uccharan karein. Man ki gashilata ko kam karein.
quotes:
Shri Krishna kehte hain:
Karm par dhyan do,
**Phal (Scroll) par nahi.**

Mann ko sthir rakho.
Chanchalta tyaago aur
**Prabhu ka dhyaan karo.**

Sansar ki maya se bahar aao.
Apne bheetar ki
**Shanti ko pehchano.**

Shiv ka dhyan dharon.
Digital shor ko tyago aur
**Shunya mein sukoon dhoondo.**

Har kshana anmol hai.
Ise vyarth na karein.
**Hari naam smaran karein.**

Maa Lakshmi ki kripa
unhi par hoti hai
**Jo samay ka samman karein.**

Bhram se bahar niklein.
Satya screen par nahi,
**Aapke bheetar hai.**

Hanuman ji jaisa bal lao.
Apni indriyon par
**Sanyam rakho.**

Ganesh ji se buddhi maango.
Vyarth ke bhatkaav ko
**Door karo.**

Ek gehri saans lo.
Param Pita ka aashirwad
**Mehsoos karo.**

Yeh screen ek maya hai.
Vaastavikta toh
**Seva aur prem mein hai.**

Chanchal mann ko roko.
Abhi viraam lo aur
**Shaanti ka anubhav karo.**

Samay hi Devta hai.
Ise digital jaal mein
**Na phansne dein.**

Maa Saraswati ka dhyan dharon.
Gyann karma se aata hai,
**Scrolling se nahi.**

Prabhu ke charnon mein
thoda samay bitayein.
**Phone side mein rakhein.**

Shri Ram sa maryada rakho.
Apne samay ki
**Seema nirdharit karo.**

Bheetar ki awaaz suno.
Notifications se zyada
**Aatma ki suno.**

Karm hi Pooja hai.
Apne kartavya ki aur
**Wapas lautein.**

Vishnu ji ki tarah
dhairya rakhein.
**Ek minute ka viraam lein.**

Maya ke bandhan ko kaato.
Digital duniya se
**Mukt ho jao.**

Maa Durga se shakti maango.
Is aadat par
**Vijay praapt karo.**

Antarmukhi bano.
Bahar ke shor ko
**Shaant hone do.**

Jo bit gaya woh samay
Radha-Raman bhi
**Wapas nahi la sakte.**

Shuddh vichar rakho.
Mastishk ko
**Viraam do.**

Prabhu ka darshana
bheetar hoga.
**Aankhein band karein.**

Vishwaas rakhein.
Aap is aadat se
**Kahin bade hain.**

Sankat Mochan ka naam lo.
Man ko bhatkaav se
**Bachao.**

Yeh jeevan ek yagya hai.
Ise vyarth ke content mein
**Aahuti na dein.**

Santosh hi sabse bada dhan hai.
Agli post ki pyaas
**Chhodo.**

Brahma ji ne srishti rachne ko
samay diya tha.
**Aap bhi apne jeevan ko dein.**

Bhakti mein hi shakti hai.
Apne focus ko
**Prabhu ki aur modon.**

Saatvik jeevan jiyein.
Digital kachre se
**Door rahein.**

Om ka uccharan karein.
Man ki gashilata ko
**Kam karein.**

Maa Kaali ki tarah
Bure abhyas ka
**Ant karein.**

Sharanagati sweekar karein.
Abhi phone rakhein aur
**Prasann rahein.**

styles.label: Learner
styles.example_quote:
The goal is a Degree,
not a high score in
**Screen Time.**
styles.breathing_appreciation: Focus reset complete. You're doing great.
breathing_quotes: Rest is not quitting. It's refueling for the long run.
Deep focus starts with a deep breath.
Consistency is built in the pauses, not just the practice.
Clear your head. The next chapter is waiting.
quotes:
The goal is a Degree,
not a high score in
**Screen Time.**

Your competition is studying
while you are scrolling.
**Get back to work.**

Don't trade your future
for a 15-second video.
**Focus on the dream.**

Notes won't memorize
themselves.
**Open the book.**

Is this scroll going to
help you pass the exam?
**Be honest.**

Late nights are for
studying, not scrolling.
**Protect your sleep.**

Focus now. Celebrate later.
**Lock the phone.**

Your parents are waiting
for your success.
**Make them proud.**

Consistency is the key.
Scrolling is the lock.
**Break the habit.**

One page today is better
than ten pages 'tomorrow'.
**Start now.**

Distraction is the enemy
of greatness.
**Kill the noise.**

The exam paper doesn't care
about your 'For You' page.
**Study hard.**

Small steps lead to
big results.
**Step away from the app.**

Be the person you
wanted to become.
**Don't just watch others.**

Discipline is choosing between
what you want now and
**what you want most.**

Your brain needs a rest,
not more content.
**Close your eyes.**

Future 'You' is watching.
Are they happy with
**this choice?**

Knowledge is power.
Scrolling is just noise.
**Choose power.**

You didn't come this far
to only come this far.
**Keep pushing.**

Excuses don't build
empires.
**Put the phone down.**

The screen is small.
Your potential is infinite.
**Look up.**

Stop waiting for 'Monday'.
Today is the day.
**Get to the desk.**

Deep Work > Shallow Scroll.
**Choose wisely.**

A year from now,
you'll wish you started today.
**Start now.**

Focus is a muscle.
Stop weakening it with
**constant scrolling.**

Success is buried under
the 'one more post' habit.
**Dig it out.**

The library is quiet.
Your mind should be too.
**Shut off the phone.**

Don't be a spectator
of other people's lives.
**Build your own.**

Hard work beats talent
when talent is busy scrolling.
**Work harder.**

The syllabus is long.
Time is short.
**Act accordingly.**

Rest is productive.
Scrolling is draining.
**Learn the difference.**

Dreams don't work unless
you do.
**Log off.**

Your focus is your
most valuable asset.
**Stop wasting it.**

Master your habits,
or they will master you.
**Control the scroll.**

You are one decision away
from a different life.
**Choose the book.**

styles.label: Kid
styles.example_quote:
Your toys are lonely!
Go play with them.
**Have fun!**
styles.breathing_appreciation: Yay! You're taking a super break!
breathing_quotes: Take a big breath like a happy dragon!
Breathe in the clouds, breathe out the silliness.
Your toys are waiting for you! Say hello to them.
You're a superstar! Real-world adventures are the best.
quotes:
Your toys are lonely!
Go play with them.
**Have fun!**

The sun is shining!
Can you go find
**a butterfly?**

**the room!**
